scripts.sidecar:build: rm -rf sidecar/knuth-im sidecar/knuth-im.exe && uv run --with pyinstaller pyinstaller --noconfirm --clean --onedir --collect-data litellm --collect-submodules tiktoken_ext --name knuth-im --distpath sidecar --workpath ../../.scratch/pyinstaller/build --specpath ../../.scratch/pyinstaller/spec ../../packages/knuth-im/src/knuth_im/__main__.py
scripts.electron:dir: npm run sidecar:build && npm run typecheck && npm run build && ELECTRON_MIRROR=${ELECTRON_MIRROR:-https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/} electron-builder --mac --dir --publish never
scripts.electron:build: npm run sidecar:build && npm run typecheck && npm run build && ELECTRON_MIRROR=${ELECTRON_MIRROR:-https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/} electron-builder --mac --publish never
